title: deserialize_chunk_data: base64 length pre-check before alloc
description: The 10 MiB chunk data deserializer checks the base64 string length before calling B64.decode, preventing the decoded Vec allocation entirely when the encoded string is already over-budget. A contributor might suggest removing the pre-check as redundant with the post-decode length check. It is not redundant: the pre-check prevents a 14 MiB string from being decoded into a 10.5 MiB Vec before the second check runs. The pattern should be preserved.
